findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 39. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The NC Energy, Mineral & Land Resources logo/graphic present in the PDF header is missing from the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the NC tree logo with 'Energy, Mineral & Land Resources / ENVIRONMENTAL QUALITY' branding in the top-left corner. The HTML rendering does not display this logo image.

findings.description: Repeated header/footer content (PAT McCRORY Governor, DONALD R. VAN DER VAART Secretary, TRACY DAVIS Director, and MEMORANDUM heading) is inserted between page-equivalent sections in the HTML, disrupting reading flow.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the header information and MEMORANDUM title appear only on page 1. In the HTML, between pages 2 and 3 content, the full header block (PAT McCRORY / Governor / DONALD R. VAN DER VAART / Secretary / TRACY DAVIS / Director) and MEMORANDUM heading are repeated, creating a reading order disruption.
